title: Members
intro: To buy a house through the cooperative, you need to become a member first.
howToJoinText: At this moment, membership sign-up is available only in person at the cooperative headquarters.
contactTitle: Need guidance or want to show interest?
contactText: You can ask our team to contact you with details on becoming a member or to register your interest in a specific project by filling out the form on that project's page.
documentsText: Read the statutes for cooperative members in the PDF below.
